enabled.label: Enabled
enabled.help: Enable the context assembly engine for selected sessions.

openclawCommand.label: OpenClaw Command
openclawCommand.help: CLI command used to fetch memory candidates. Defaults to 'openclaw'.

selfLearning.enabled.label: Nightly Self-Learning
selfLearning.enabled.help: Run the built-in nightly self-learning pass inside the plugin.

selfLearning.localTime.label: Nightly Learn Time
selfLearning.localTime.help: Local wall-clock time for the nightly self-learning run. Defaults to 00:00.

maxCandidates.label: Max Candidates
maxCandidates.help: Maximum number of recall candidates fetched before reranking.

maxSelectedChunks.label: Max Selected Chunks
maxSelectedChunks.help: Maximum number of memory chunks inserted into the assembled context.

maxChunksPerPath.label: Max Chunks Per Path
maxChunksPerPath.help: Limit how many chunks from the same document can enter one assembled context.

memoryBudgetRatio.label: Memory Budget Ratio
memoryBudgetRatio.help: Fraction of token budget reserved for retrieved long-memory context.

recentMessageCount.label: Recent Message Count
recentMessageCount.help: Number of most recent conversation messages always preserved.

excludePaths.label: Exclude Paths
excludePaths.help: Substring path filters applied after memory recall, useful for excluding plugin repos or engineering docs from user memory.

queryRewrite.enabled.label: Query Rewrite
queryRewrite.enabled.help: Generate a few retrieval query variants before recall to improve hit stability across different phrasings.

queryRewrite.maxQueries.label: Rewrite Query Count
queryRewrite.maxQueries.help: Maximum number of rewritten retrieval queries used for one recall.

dialogueWorkingSetShadow.enabled.label: Dialogue Shadow
dialogueWorkingSetShadow.enabled.help: Enable runtime working-set shadow telemetry for multi-topic dialogue turns.

dialogueWorkingSetShadow.model.label: Dialogue Shadow Model
dialogueWorkingSetShadow.model.help: Model override for the working-set shadow decision.

dialogueWorkingSetShadow.provider.label: Dialogue Shadow Provider
dialogueWorkingSetShadow.provider.help: Optional provider override used with dialogueWorkingSetShadow.model.

dialogueWorkingSetShadow.timeoutMs.label: Dialogue Shadow Timeout
dialogueWorkingSetShadow.timeoutMs.help: Maximum wait time for one shadow decision.

dialogueWorkingSetShadow.maxTurns.label: Dialogue Shadow Max Turns
dialogueWorkingSetShadow.maxTurns.help: Maximum projected transcript turns sent into the shadow decision.

dialogueWorkingSetShadow.minTurns.label: Dialogue Shadow Min Turns
dialogueWorkingSetShadow.minTurns.help: Minimum projected turns required before the shadow path runs.

dialogueWorkingSetShadow.maxCharsPerTurn.label: Dialogue Shadow Chars Per Turn
dialogueWorkingSetShadow.maxCharsPerTurn.help: Maximum characters preserved from each turn in the shadow transcript.

dialogueWorkingSetShadow.outputDir.label: Dialogue Shadow Output Dir
dialogueWorkingSetShadow.outputDir.help: Sidecar output directory for runtime shadow exports.

dialogueWorkingSetShadow.cleanupSession.label: Dialogue Shadow Cleanup
dialogueWorkingSetShadow.cleanupSession.help: Delete the temporary shadow subagent session after capture.

dialogueWorkingSetGuarded.enabled.label: Dialogue Guarded Path
dialogueWorkingSetGuarded.enabled.help: Enable the very narrow guarded working-set active path.

dialogueWorkingSetGuarded.allowedRelatio.label: Dialogue Guarded Relations
dialogueWorkingSetGuarded.allowedRelatio.help: Only allow guarded activation for selected relation classes.

dialogueWorkingSetGuarded.minReductionRa.label: Dialogue Guarded Min Reduction
dialogueWorkingSetGuarded.minReductionRa.help: Minimum raw reduction ratio required before guarded activation.

dialogueWorkingSetGuarded.minEvictedTurn.label: Dialogue Guarded Min Evictions
dialogueWorkingSetGuarded.minEvictedTurn.help: Minimum evicted turn count required before guarded activation.

dialogueWorkingSetGuarded.prependCarryFo.label: Dialogue Guarded Carry Forward
dialogueWorkingSetGuarded.prependCarryFo.help: When enabled, prepend the carry-forward block ahead of filtered messages.

openclawAdapter.governedExports.agentNam.label: Agent Sub Namespace
openclawAdapter.governedExports.agentNam.help: When enabled, governed memory reads merge workspace-shared memory with the current agent's sub-namespace, and nightly self-learning writes per-agent artifacts into that sub-namespace.

openclawAdapter.debug.canaryTool.label: Canary Tool
openclawAdapter.debug.canaryTool.help: Register the internal accepted-action canary tool for end-to-end host verification only.

openclawAdapter.ordinaryConversationMemo.label: Ordinary Conversation Memory
openclawAdapter.ordinaryConversationMemo.help: Turn ordinary agent_end conversations into governed memory_intent ingestion without waiting for nightly learning.

openclawAdapter.ordinaryConversationMemo.label: Conversation Capture Max Chars
openclawAdapter.ordinaryConversationMemo.help: Ignore very long user turns for ordinary-conversation governed memory capture.

openclawAdapter.governedExports.agentWor.label: Agent Workspace Overrides
openclawAdapter.governedExports.agentWor.help: Optional map from agent id to workspace id. Use this when one agent, such as code, should read and learn in a different workspace namespace without moving every agent.

llmRerank.enabled.label: LLM Rerank
llmRerank.enabled.help: Use a subagent run to rerank top candidates with a model.

llmRerank.model.label: LLM Rerank Model
llmRerank.model.help: Model override for reranking, for example 'gpt-5.4'.

llmRerank.provider.label: LLM Rerank Provider
llmRerank.provider.help: Optional provider override used with llmRerank.model.

llmRerank.maxSnippetChars.label: Rerank Snippet Chars
llmRerank.maxSnippetChars.help: Maximum characters from each snippet sent to the rerank model.

llmRerank.minScoreDeltaToSkip.label: Skip Delta
llmRerank.minScoreDeltaToSkip.help: Skip model reranking when the best heuristic candidate is already clearly ahead.
